calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Peter F. Caron, Esq., 415-831-4204, for defendant and moving party Catherine Haniff.
Fred Keeperman, Esq., 925-631-7710, for plaintiff and opposing party The National Collection Agency, Inc.
Victor Blama, process server present
Catherine Haniff, present in the courtroom.

RULING:
A R G U E D; Process server Victor Blama was sworn and examined. Exhibits 1 & 2, (two 8 1/2 x 11 documents) were marked. The Court asked counsel and parties to discuss settlement in the hallway. All parties returned to courtroom with a settlement. DEFENDANT CATHERINE HANIFF'S Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default And Default Judgment is not ruled on in light of the settlement. Terms placed on the record. Exhibits were returned to plaintiff's counsel. Written order pending. (301/AJR/EH) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
